subcodes.first_line: O tailor! Christ hath declared that it is easier for a camel to pass through the eye of a needle than for a rich man to enter [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای خیاط حضرت مسیح میفرماید دخول الجمل فی سم الخیاط اسهل من دخول الغنی فی
subcodes.subjects: @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @religion as reality; definitions of religion
